data.content: Approved implementation review. AgentHistoryView adds debugPanelOpen state and closes it on loaded beat changes, exposes a Debug/Close Debug button in the conversation log header when sessions exist, and renders the conversation log plus HistoryDebugPanel side-by-side with the loaded beat title and latest session wired through. Verified against the knot description with no invariant violations found. Test coverage in src/components/__tests__/agent-history-view-debug-integration.test.ts covers button visibility, open/closed labels, and panel rendering. Sanity checks passed in this checkout: bun run lint src/components/agent-history-view.tsx src/components/__tests__/agent-history-view-debug-integration.test.ts, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test -- src/components/__tests__/agent-history-view-debug-integration.test.ts src/components/__tests__/history-debug-panel.test.ts, and bun run build.
